backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and all backend functions for user registration, admin management, question/test CRUD, test submission, and leaderboard; questions use image URLs instead of plain text.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts legacy text-based questions (questionText/optionTexts) to the new image-URL-based schema (questionImageUrl/optionImageUrls) while preserving all other actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their file targets, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for the image-based question UI updates across admin and student-facing components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's role and notable changes such as image-based question rendering and admin claim logic.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Concept Delta', mounting the app at #root and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (/, /dashboard, /test/$testId, /admin, /results) and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: An admin dialog modal for adding a new image-based question by providing URLs for the question image and four option images, selecting the correct option, and submitting via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: Displays a ranked leaderboard table of students sorted by average score, showing rank badges (gold/silver/bronze for top 3), name, tests taken, average score percentage, and best score.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: An admin gallery view that lists all existing questions with their images and correct answer labels in a responsive grid, and provides a button to open the AddQuestionModal for adding new questions.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin component that fetches and displays all test results in a table, showing user ID, test name, score, and submission time with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/subject/duration, and toggling publish status of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table with their name, class (11th/12th/Dropper), and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navy navbar handling Internet Identity login/logout, silently calling claimAdmin after login, and conditionally showing the Admin Panel link only when isAdmin is strictly true.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal form component that collects a new user's full name, class (11th/12th), and contact number, then saves the profile via a mutation hook before calling an onComplete callback.
Renders a single quiz question with its image and four image-based answer options in a selectable grid, highlighting the currently selected answer and showing option labels (A–D).
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a test including its name, subject badge, duration, and question count, with a 'Start Test' button that navigates to the test route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: A countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, displays MM:SS format, turns red with a pulsing icon when under 60 seconds, and calls onTimeUp when it reaches zero.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control if an admin token is present in URL params.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via React context and DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including profile management, admin checks, test CRUD, question management, result submission, and leaderboard fetching.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a navy-blue design system in both light and dark modes, plus utility classes for navy color variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that guards access by checking authentication and admin status, then renders tabbed sections for managing questions, tests, users, results, and the leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page that displays user stats (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published tests, redirecting unauthenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, and a CTA button that either logs the user in via Internet Identity or navigates to the dashboard if already authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content or exports yet.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Authenticated results page that fetches and displays the user's past test submissions in a table with score, percentage, and submission date, redirecting unauthenticated users to home.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: React page component that renders a timed MHT-CET test, handling question navigation, answer selection, auto-submit on timer expiry, and a post-submission answer review with correct/incorrect highlighting.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom navy color palette, extended typography/font families, border radii, box shadows, CSS variable-based semantic colors, and accordion keyframe animations with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 21) describing the Concept Delta MHT-CET test series app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions including the Motoko backend, Internet Identity auth, and image-based question storage.
